actions.value:
Hi,
thanks for reaching out and sorry for the inconvenience.

The latest release of the Edge app contains some new features that requires a minimum version of an Android system app called Webview. It’s an app you wouldn’t use directly as a user but one that Edge uses to run all of the cryptocurrency code in the background. I suspect that the version of Webview on your device may be outdated and an update to that app may resolve the issue you’re having logging into Edge.

You can search for "Android System Webview" in Play Store and see if you have an update.
You may also need to update Chrome.

Then try to login into Edge again.
